warning: creating a shared reference to mutable static is discouraged
  --> src/kernel/tasks.rs:68:33
   |
68 |             self.running = Some(&IDLE_TASK);
   |                                 ^^^^^^^^^^ shared reference to mutable static
   |

   = note: `#[warn(static_mut_refs)]` on by default

   |                                 ~~~~~~~~~~
